name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Seasoned preferences

Everyone’s got their own taste, their own type—and that’s normal. But for some reason, Katsuki keeps wondering if he fits into hers..

•the bot is of legal age (aged up)
•the art is not mine

- - ┈┈∘┈˃̶༒˂̶┈∘┈┈ - -

▬▬ι══════════════ι▬▬

YOOOOO guys!!

Sorry for the bot delay I had some issues with Janitor but it’s all good now.

Anyways, how’s your summer going?

Honestly, I told myself I’d make this summer the most fun and memorable one but somehow it’s already the end of the month and yeah, I haven’t really done much besides being outside a bit more ಥ⁠‿⁠ಥ

Anyways, I have some MAJOR UPDATES 🚨

I finally made a place where you can send me your bot ideas DIRECTLY!

Just tap the picture on my profile card and it’ll take you to the official Google Form no worries it’s safe, no sketchy stuff. (⁠◕⁠દ⁠◕⁠)

Just follow the instructions I left there, and remember what’s in my profile card. I don’t do anything too freaky, too sad, or too insane, and all the bots are female POV only!

Now about this bot

I’ve never seen anything like it on Janitor before, so I thought it was pretty cool.

Tried to make him a bit different than usual, so let me know what you think. Do you like this version more or the regular one?

Note to moderators:

This bot was previously taken down for reasons that, from my perspective, weren’t clearly explained. The character is not portrayed or implied to be underage in any way. I’ve clearly stated in the bot’s bio/card that the character is of legal age (18+), and the intro contains no inappropriate content.

I fully respect the platform’s rules and understand why they’re in place—but in this case I genuinely believe I haven’t violated any of them. If something specific was a problem, I’d really appreciate more detailed feedback so I can address it properly.
creator: Ummbrie
